      "text": "Typst is the best option for generating PDFs from markdown on ARM64/OL9, already implemented, but MD to Typst conversion is fragile; Pandoc (binary ~40MB for ARM64) can convert MD to Typst, avoiding manual conversion; WeasyPrint and Puppeteer/Chromium are too heavy for 12GB RAM; recommended approach: install Pandoc for conversion and keep Typst for PDF compilation.",

      "text": "Typst is the best option for generating PDFs from markdown on ARM64/OL9, already implemented, but MD to Typst conversion is fragile; Pandoc (binary ~40MB for ARM64) can convert MD to Typst, avoiding manual conversion; WeasyPrint and Puppeteer/Chromium are too heavy for 12GB RAM; recommended approach: install Pandoc for conversion and keep Typst for PDF compilation.",
